response.original_title: The Lost Fish: The Struggle to Save Pacific Lamprey
response.overview: One of the Pacific Northwest's oldest fish is disappearing, and along with it the sacred place it holds among many Native American Indian Tribes. For a species that has squeezed through most of the earth's great extinctions, the plight of Pacific Lamprey may be a signal of ecological distress.
response.title: The Lost Fish: The Struggle to Save Pacific Lamprey
